proposal.working_title: Agentic Commerce for Mid-Market Brands: A 90-Day Implementation Playbook
proposal.one_line_angle: While McKinsey explains the macro shift, we map the exact agent stack, vendor choices, and revenue checkpoints a mid-market commerce team can ship in one quarter.
outline_bullets: What changes when an AI agent transacts on behalf of the buyer, and what the first wave of production deployments shows about conversion and AOV
The minimum viable agentic commerce stack: discovery agent, checkout broker, identity rails, and the vendor choices behind each
A 90-day implementation roadmap with go/no-go gates, instrumentation, and revenue checkpoints for a mid-market commerce team
